title: PV Sindhu Claims Japan Open Title, Ends Two-Year Drought
indian_angle: Indian badminton star PV Sindhu secured a significant title, marking a strong comeback after a challenging two-year period.
summary: PV Sindhu defeated Akane Yamaguchi in straight games to win her maiden Japan Open title, ending a two-year title drought and signaling a return to top form.

title: Delhi Venue Undergoing Major Revamp for 2026 World Championships
indian_angle: India is preparing to host the BWF World Championships 2026 in Delhi with significant venue upgrades to prevent past embarrassments.
summary: Following issues with bird droppings and monkeys at the India Open, the venue for the upcoming BWF World Championships 2026 in Delhi is undergoing a major revamp to ensure a world-class event.

title: BAI Releases Eligibility and Selection Criteria for World Junior Championships
indian_angle: Badminton Association of India has issued guidelines for player eligibility and announced the selection tournament for the upcoming BWF World Junior Championships in Cairo.
summary: The BAI has released the eligibility criteria for Indian players aiming for the BWF World Junior Championships 2026 in Cairo, designating the Bhubaneswar U-19 Ranking Tournament as the key selection event.

title: New 3x15 Scoring System Adopted for Indian Domestic Tournaments
indian_angle: A new 3x15 scoring system has been implemented across all domestic ranking tournaments and national championships for U-13, U-15, and U-17 age groups in India.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has introduced a 3x15 scoring system for all domestic ranking tournaments and National Championships across junior age categories, with its debut set for Ernakulam.

title: BAI Launches Grassroot Coaches Development Program in Guwahati and Raipur
indian_angle: BAI is conducting a Coaches Development Program at the grassroots level in Guwahati and Raipur to nurture future badminton talent across India.
summary: The Badminton Association of India is running a Coaches Development Program at the grassroots level in its National Centres of Excellence in Guwahati and Raipur from July 15th to 24th, 2026.
